description: Clever, versatile, and powerful, the Coleman Microburst Mini-Lantern is four lights in one. Give one to each family member at the campsite or nighttime event! The four detachable light "pods" can be used separately -- each has its own On/Off switch, runs for up to 12 continuous hours and sheds 10 lumens of light -- or they can be docked into the base station for a single bright mini-lantern. When docked, the lights are powered by four AA batteries, and run up to 25 continuous hours, shedding 40 lumens of light. Each pod sports a pocket clip, elastic rubber loop, and magnet -- so it can be attached to virtually anything! Four colored lenses (red, amber, blue, and green) store in the base and easily clip onto each pod, so you can assign a color to each person carrying one and easily identify them in the dark.
reviewText: Hardly ever used it and the battery door on the back of one of the lights already broke off and it doesn't stay connected to the unit anymore. It needs a ton of different batteries that have to be replaced at the same time

title: Coleman Compression Sack
description: Whether you're packing or storing your gear, reduce your bulk with a Coleman Compression Sack. Its unique design compresses large sleeping bags or other soft items with three straps that tighten around the outside. When you're ready to go, the sturdy web handle on the bottom makes one-handed carrying simple.
reviewText: When i went to put my bag in the sack the middle strap apparently was either defective or of terrible quality that the yellow strap itself tore at the buckle. I am very disappointed in this product, Coleman is usually very good. I do not recommend this sack to anyone and will not buy another.

title: COLEMAN 3-Piece Nylon Serving Set
description: Serve up your outdoor meals with the ease of the ColemanAr 3-Piece Nylon Serving Set. The durable, lightweight spoon, slotted spoon, and spatula won_Tt scratch your coated cookware, and a metal ring holds them all together for outdoor organization. When the fun is done, they clean up easily under water or in the dishwasher.
reviewText: These have come in very handy when cooking outdoors.

title: Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Grill Case for LX Series Grills
description: Add even more portability to your Coleman RoadTrip LX Series Grill when you pack it inside a Coleman RoadTrip Rolling Case. This heavy-duty, weather-resistant case includes easy-glide wheels for more mobility and top and side handles for better control. A durable zipper and inner straps secure the grill the entire trip, and inside pockets fit accessories and condiments for whatever meal youre planning to cook up.
reviewText:
First...the Coleman Roadtrip grill and this bag are VERY HEAVY. That's not a bad thing but it was MUCH MUCH heavier than I imagined it would be. I've got a el-cheapo gas grill that's much larger that weighs HALF what this portable one does. NOT impressed with the weight to features.

This is a nice THICK bag. The rollers are a nice add-on to drag it around by.
This is a very big bag. I easily fit inside it and I'm not a small guy (don't ask WHY I tried).
The pockets for the burners is pretty tight and the velcro is aggravating the way it's orientated.
Well built...does the job but, again, not what I would term 'portable'. I would NOT go this route again.

title: Coleman Dome Tent for Camping | Sundome Tent with Easy Setup
description: Sundome 2P Dome TentFeatures:Up to 33% more water resistant verses a comparable standard Coleman tent Weathertec System patented welded floors and inverted seams help keep water outSnag-Free continuous pole sleeves for easy setup Ground Vent for increased ventilationTwo windows for great ventilation and viewsDoor awning helps keep the rain out E-Port makes it easy to bring electrical power inside your tent Storage pocket to keep your gear organized Expandable carry bag lets you tear away the rip strip for easy packingSpecifications:Doors:1 D-DoorRainfly:PolyguardTent:Polyguard,Polyester Mesh 68DPoles:FiberglassWeight: 7.2 (3.3 KG)<br/
reviewText: I used this tent last year for a hiking trip. It's not the lightest weight tent I've seen out there, but for a budget minded person, it works well.  The tent isn't the best quality, but it works well in fair weather conditions.  I was the only person in my tent, and with my gear, it was about all you'd want to fit.  If you have two people wanting to fit in this tent, you may need to keep most of you gear outside.  The tent is very easy to setup and take down.  It packs away into a small space, and has a nice "floor mat" that you can use when you go in or out to put your shoes on.  In colder weather, this tent isn't much more than a wind shield, and even there, with the vent on the back side that you cannot close, its really hard to keep warm. Otherwise, it's a good starter tent for camping/hiking.

title: Coleman Triton Series 2-Burner Stove
description: Cook breakfast, lunch and dinner on the legendary durability of a Coleman Triton Series 2-Burner Stove. Once this propane camping stove starts to heat up, PerfectHeat Technology gets the temperatures just right, WindBlock Shields keep the wind from blowing the flames around and the PerfectFlow Pressure Control System keeps the heat steady on each of the high-performance 11,000-BTU burners. The spacious cooking surface is large enough to fit a 10-in. (25.4 cm) pan and 12-in. (30.48 cm) pan at the same time, and independently-adjustable controls allow you to set your heat anywhere from simmer to boil. The two burner camp stove is also efficient, with a 1-hr. runtime on high using a single 16.4-oz. propane cylinder. When the fun is done, removable heavy-duty, nickel-chrome grates make cleaning easy, and the built-in handle will have you carrying this lightweight stove effortlessly.
reviewText: Works great and the burner control works great but the external pipe seems to be a little flimsy. Will have to see how long it lasts.

title: Coleman Camping Coffee Maker
description: Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. END
reviewText:
I'm not sure if it was the grind of my coffee or the coffee maker but the water wasn't draining through the coffee and filter very well. It seemed to be backing up in the tray the coffee is held in. Also the door to the coffee tray kept popping open.

Having said that, it's still better than a  percolator so I'll keep using it.

title: Coleman Octagon 98-2 Room Tent
description: Coleman Octagon 98 with Full Rainfly Features: - Water-resistant polyester rainfly included with taped seams - provides excellent rain protection - Full length zip-on fly for great ventilation - Exclusive weathered system - Color coded pole attachments for easy set up - Windows and mesh roof - provides maximum ventilation - Removable privacy wall to create separate rooms - Interior storage pockets with cup holders - Room divider with multiple possible configurations Specifications: - Doors: One hinged, one d-door - Rainfly: Polyester taffeta 68d - Inner Tent: Polyester taffeta 68d, polyester mesh 68d - Floor: Polyethylene 1000d - Poles: Steel - Center Height: 6'10" - Base Dimensions: 13' x 13'.
reviewText: We got this tent for Christmas knowing we were going to be going on a National Parks Roadtrip and knowing that we needed a new tent. It has been amazing. Very roomy it goes up quickly and takes down easy. We have never had a problem getting into the bag like with some other tents. The rain fly was missing one of its hooks but it isn't a problem we just hook it differently. AGAIN we love this tent!

title: Coleman Outdoor Compact Table
description: The Coleman Compact Aluminum Table is the perfect camping and outdoor cooking companion. Hot pots and pans will not damage the aluminum slat top. Accordion style steel frame is sturdy and easy to set up.Table height 27.5".Table Weight 9 lbs. 8 oz..Folded Size: 5.5" x 5.5" x 27.5"..Weight capacity 100 lbs..Includes storage bag with carry strap.Directions conveniently sewn on to carry bag..Color: Silver.Import..
reviewText: I bought this as a side table for camping and it worked out perfectly. It comes with a carrying bag and doesn't take up much room when transporting, easy to carry.

title: Coleman Cabin Tent with Instant Setup | Cabin Tent for Camping Sets Up in 60 Seconds
description: The Coleman Instant Cabin makes getting camp set up quicker and easier than ever. This instant tent has pre-attached poles that make setting up camp as simple as unfolding, extending, and securing. You can assemble the tent in about a minute and then get started on your adventure. This camping tent is designed with the WeatherTec system that features patented welded floors and inverted seams to help ensure you stay dry if it starts to rain. An integrated vented rainfly offers added protection from the rain and improves airflow without the need for extra assembly. This backpacking tent is made from rugged Polyguard 2X double-thick fabric that stands up to the rigors of the outdoors, so you can use it reliably season after season. This 6-person tent offers enough room for two queen size air beds and comes with integrated storage pockets to help you keep small items organized. And when its time to go home, the camping tent packs away securely in the included expandable carry bag that lets you tear away the rip strip for easy packing.
reviewText: It really does set up in 60 seconds, comes down in about 3 (including rolling and tying) and easily fits back into the bag.  The floor did develop two pinprick holes after setting up on a rocky surface, but they didn't let in water, even after a torrential downpour.  This tent stayed up under extremely windy conditions and in pretty extreme weather. Fantastic for touring when you're camping for only one night and moving on.  I'm really happy with this purchase!

title: Coleman Steel-Belted Portable Cooler, 54 Quart
description: Go back in time with cold food and drinks today when you take a Coleman 54 Quart Steel Belted Cooler along with you. It looks just like the one you remember with its classic design first developed in 1954. Large enough to hold 85 cans and tall enough to hold 2-liter bottles upright, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip steel handles and stainless steel lid latch make getting to your destination easy, comfortable and secure. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax while you enjoy the day with a cold drink in hand. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. A Coleman Steel Belted Cooler will rekindle your fondest outdoor memories  and equip you to make many new ones.
reviewText: Should be no stars... Cooler arrived with a dent in the lid. We decided to ignor it, and went camping. We put of drinks, food, and perishables in, added 20# ice and latched the top down, and I were very surprised that the ice was TOTALLY melted after only 6 hours!  We had to make daily trips for ice. What a camping bummer!  Might be ok for indoor party cooler, but not outside!

title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
reviewText: Awesome, kept me in hot meals during Hurricane Irma

title: Coleman Self-Inflating Camping Pad with Pillow
description: Enjoy additional support and cushioning with the Coleman Self-Inflating Camping Pad with Pillow. This camping sleeping pad features a comfy tufted design that adds an extra layer of padding between your sleeping bag and the ground. Equipped with a free-flow valve, the sleeping pad self-inflates with no air pump needed. Simply roll it out and open the valve, and the pad will begin inflating. When it's time to pack up, reopen the valve and push the air out using the compression straps. Thanks to its durable, weather-resistant polyester shell, this camping sleeping pad can endure night after night of use.
reviewText: Heavy and very plastic-y feeling and smelling.  After airing it out and leaving it inflated for a week or so, it finally smoothed out and the small faded some.  To call is "self-inflating" is true only if you want it to self inflate about half-way, and then you finish it off by blowing it up, like you have to blow up the so-so pillow.  I like Coleman stuff, but this one is pretty so-so.  In fact, that sums up this pad in my book.  Just so-so.

title: Coleman Standard String Tie #21 Mantles: 2-pkgs of 4 Mantles (8 Total Mantles)
description: Coleman Lantern #21 String Tie Mantles. For use on Coleman lantern models: 200, 201, 214, 220, 275, 285, 286, 288, 290, 295, 5107, 5114, 5150, 5151, 5152, 5153, 5154, 5155, 5159, 5177, 5178, 9950 and 9960. Total of 8 mantles included (2-pkgs of 4 mantles). Coleman part number 21A104.
reviewText: They are real coleman mantles.

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText: Love the size. love the color. love the ease of setting up and breaking down, except one thing. this tent NEED's to be staked down to stay up. if it is not, it will collapse. :"( This was a bummer because sometimes we camp on compacted dirt (thank god i use cots too).

title: Coleman 24-Piece Enamel Dinnerware Set, Red
description:
Serve up your favorite foods around the campfire or portable stove with the Coleman 24-Piece Enamel Dinnerware Set. Made of double-fired enamel and featuring a timeless red speckled design, this outdoor dinnerware set offers classic style and durability and is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. This 24-piece set includes four 10-inch dinner plates, four 12-ounce coffee mugs with handles, and four 6-inch bowls, making it a great choice for family meals at picnics, BBQs, and campsites. It also includes a silverware kit with four plastic-handled forks, spoons, and knives stored in a convenient roll-up pouch for easy organization and storage. Ideal for camping, picnicking, and even backyard use, this set of Coleman speckled dinnerware includes everything you need to eat a meal under the stars. The 24-piece set is outfitted with four 10-inch dinner plates, four 10-ounce mugs, and four 6-inch bowls, giving you and three co-campers enough containers for a main course, a side salad, and an after-dinner hot chocolate. In addition, the set comes with four knives, four spoons, and four forks, so you don't need to rely on plastic silverware when eating. Best of all, the set is durable and dishwasher-safe, with a red-speckled enamel surface that holds up to heavy use. The silverware also includes a compact carrying case to keep the cutlery bunched together. About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: Basic camping gear

title: Coleman 2-Pole Sun Shade
description: A great choice for outdoor parties, sporting events, or a day at the lake, Coleman Sun Shades feature UVGuard fabric to provide excellent protection from the sun's ultraviolet rays. The 2-Pole Sun Shade measures 10'x10', with a center height of 7'6". The Shade sets up easily on strong 22mm steel poles. UVGuard 185T 75D polyester taffeta fabric.
reviewText: I found this Sun Shade more trouble than it's literally worth ($$$) to set up; after the fact, I found other choices available that would provide the same amount of sun shade with less set up hassles. At least the shade portion was able to be repurposed as a "tarp" to anchor and sit on outdoors. Would not purchase again or recommend this item.

title: Coleman Tent Kit
description: Set up the tent quickly with the steel tent pegs and rubber mallet. Keep it clean for the entire campout with the nesting hand broom and dustpan. When the fun is done, use the tent stake puller to get the pegs out of the ground easily. All four of these important tools fit nicely inside the mesh carry bag for the next adventure.
reviewText: I'm not entirely sure why I bought this. It seemed like a good idea at the time I was buying two tents. However, once it arrived, I thought I may have been losing it. Who wants to carry a single purpose mallet around simply to hammer in tent spikes. There are cheaper and less heavy ways to accomplish the same thing. Nevertheless, I'm too lazy to send things back so I kept the kick. I expect that it will just remain in my basement as I carry my camp axe in place of the mallet.

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText: Our family of 5 is happy with this tent.  My only complaint is that to enter the tent, you have to step over like 12" of tent.  I guess it's good to keep rain out but my 3 year old trips every time.  GREAT space inside though and easy to put up and take down.

title: Coleman Coastal Xtreme Series Marine Portable Cooler, 120 Quart
description: Keep your food and drinks cold for the full length of your next boating excursion with the Coleman 120-Quart Coastal Xtreme 6-Day Marine Cooler. Specially designed for boating and fishing, this portable cooler combines a generous capacity with a rugged design that stands up to tough saltwater conditions. Large enough to store up to 204 cans, the cooler offers plenty of room for beverages, food, and any catch you might haul on board. The insulated lid and walls offer up to 6 days of ice retention, helping ensure your catch stays fresh even during multiday voyages. Built to withstand years of rugged marine use, this heavy-duty cooler comes equipped with rust-resistant stainless steel hardware and UV Guard sun protection that resists yellowing and cracking. A threaded drain with an easy-to-clean valve allows you to empty excess water without tilting the cooler. The smooth EZ-Clean lid easily wipes clean of grime and dirt, while the Have-A-Seat lid offers a comfortable place to sit and relax. And thanks to its comfortable no-crush handle grips, this fishing cooler is easy to transport, whether you're bringing whole meals on a boating trip or heading to your favorite fishing spot.
reviewText: Huge and sturdy.

title: Coleman Outdoor Compact Table
description: The Coleman Compact Aluminum Table is the perfect camping and outdoor cooking companion. Hot pots and pans will not damage the aluminum slat top. Accordion style steel frame is sturdy and easy to set up.Table height 27.5".Table Weight 9 lbs. 8 oz..Folded Size: 5.5" x 5.5" x 27.5"..Weight capacity 100 lbs..Includes storage bag with carry strap.Directions conveniently sewn on to carry bag..Color: Silver.Import..
reviewText: Took it out of the box last month and it was broken. Seems that my return window is closed and I have a broken table!

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText: Its a nice roomy tent, but the zipper does not work for the first time we used it. Now its frustrating and we can't return it. Would not recommend, will not purchase again.

title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
reviewText:
First...why do I not like it? It's heavy...I don't mean a little heavy...it's REALLY HEAVY.

When I needed a grill to take camping with my new travel trailer I read the reviews and purchased this. I WAS using a cheap gas grill from Lowes that I mounted to it's stand with thumbscrews. It worked but you had the grill body, it's stand, and a gas bottle. All took up room. So I figured a portable tailgate type grill would be great. Low and behold...Amazon had this one in the Warehouse deals...so I got it.

This thing is a beast...has to be 60+ pounds with bag and 2 bottles....W.T.H. ?? My el-cheapo grill with it's stand is like 1/3rd of that. So, it's heavier than my 'red-necked' grill. Big too...in it's bag it will NOT fit in my front storage area under my travel trailer. I have to put it inside the trailer or the back of my truck to take it with me.

It DOES cook well. I've used it for burgers and weenies and seem to cook evenly. It has a LOT of room and the controls are well labeled. I just wish it was half the weight.

title: Coleman Rest Easy Camp Pad
description: Get a good night's rest with the Coleman Rest Easy Camp Pad. The closed cell foam protects you from uncomfortable surfaces and helps insulate you from the cold ground.
reviewText: This mat is made of something similar to styrofoam, not like a memory foam product. I bought to add some cushion under the beds in my pop-up camper. I don't know how this will hold up for sleeping on the ground while hiking or camping, and I seriously doubt it will retain it's shape for long.

title: Coleman Camping Coffee Maker
description: Easily make drip-brewed coffee while enjoying the outdoors with the Coleman Camping Coffee Maker. Designed with a steel base that fits over most 2- and 3-burner camp stoves, this camping coffee maker features a large reservoir that enables you to brew up to 10 cups of hot coffee at once. Making coffee with this outdoor coffee maker is easy. Simply spoon grounds into the removable swing-out filter basket, fill the reservoir with water, and place the coffee maker over your stove burner. Within minutes, the 10-cup glass carafe will be filled with freshly brewed coffee ready to be enjoyed in the great outdoors. A Pause 'N Serve feature lets you grab a cup before the brew cycle is finished. The Coleman Camping Coffee Maker measures 8.5 x 11 x 14 inches. About Coleman More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come. END
reviewText: I was skeptical of this before I bought it but I am glad that did.  I had read some negative reviews about melting baseplates and warping plastic.  I had none of those issues.  The coffee pot worked flawlessly.  It took maybe 12 to 15 minutes to brew a whole pot.  I do wish it came with the stainless steel pot instead of the the glass.  The stainless steel pot is available as an aftermarket upgrade though so I might buy it.  Once the water goes through the system and you turn the gas off, there is not really anything to keep the warming plate heated.  I definitely recommend buying a steel vacuum bottle carafe to keep the coffee hot after it is brewed.

title: Coleman RoadTrip LXX Portable Propane Grill, Black
description: Show off your grilling skills on camping trips or at tailgate parties with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Portable Propane Grill. This outdoor grill combines a collapsible, portable design with convenient features that facilitate grilling in tough conditions. The grill's individually adjustable dual burners each blast out 10,000 BTUs of heat, giving you enough cooking power to prepare a wide range of foods, from grilled veggies to thick slabs of steak. The Swaptop interchangeable design allows you to switch out the grill grates for a griddle top or stove grate (both sold separately), while the Instastart ignition lets you light the burners by simply pushing a button. Ideal for summer cookouts, this portable gas grill also excels in chilly conditions thanks to PerfectFlow technology, which helps ensure steady heat output. Sliding tables on both sides of the grill provide easy access to ingredients and utensils and can be tucked away for easy transport and storage. With its 285-square-inch cooktop, this grill offers a large cooking surface area without sacrificing portability. Its collapsible stand sets up in seconds and folds up for compact storage, while its large handle and wheels make the grill easy to transport. And thanks to its porcelain-coated cast iron grates and removable grease tray, this camp grill is easy to clean.
reviewText: We ordered the first one, it had a broked handle right out of the box, sent it back for an exchange. The new one came quickly, it also had a broken part. The ventury tube was broken off. Sent that one back for refund. Bought its little brother the LXE, flawless. I think the broken handle was a shipping problem but the broken burner tube was a manufacturing fault

title: Coleman Stainless Steel Cooler Hinges
description: Get more life out of your cooler by easily repairing it with a two-pack of Coleman stainless steel cooler hinges. For use on the following Coleman coolers: 5226, 5250, 5255, 5256, 5297, 5298, 5299, 5862, 5884, 5887, 6050, 6154, 6155, 6200, 6201, 6250, 6251, 6257, 6262, 6263, 6270, 6281, 6296, 6297, 6298, 6499
reviewText: perfect longer lasting solution for the marching band cooler, which gets tons more use than a normal cooler!

title: Coleman Instant Pop-Up Canopy Tent and Sun Shelter, 13 x 13 Feet
description:
The Coleman Instant Pop-Up Canopy Tent and Sun Shelter, 13 x 13 Feet, assembles in 3 minutes in 3 easy steps to create a shady area outdoors. This canopy cover is made with UV Guard material that offers protection from the suns harmful rays and features 2-way roof vents to keep the air circulating when the temperature rises. The lightweight preattached telescoping poles can be assembled without having to reach over your head, so anyone can set up the tent easily, while comfort grips lock the shelter into place with pinch-free adjustability. Once the canopy tent is assembled, it offers stable shelter on grass, concrete, and asphalt thanks to its welded steel feet. When its time to pack up, this shelter can be stored and transported in the included easy-pull wheeled carry bag, which fits inside most cars. The Coleman 13-by-13-foot Back Home Instant Shelter provides an easy, convenient shelter in the backyard, at a campsite, sporting event, or wherever you need reliable cover from the sun. The Shelter's sturdy, one-piece steel frame sets up quickly and easily in only three minutes, with Coleman's exclusive push-button release levers so your fingers stay safe during setup and takedown. The heavy-duty shelter canopy gives you an instant hex-shaped shelter with a generous center height of eight feet, four inches and also features SPF 50+ UV Guard protection from the sun's rays. Features:
  • Sets up in less than 3 minutes
  • Heavy-duty 150D canopy with 50+ UV Guard sun protection
  • Sturdy 28mm one-piece steel frame
  • Exclusive push-button release levers take it easy on fingers
  • Hexagon shape for a distinct shelter
  • Wheeled carry bag
  • Footed poles for easy securing and stabilization with steel tent pegs
Specifications:
  • Shaded Area: 13 by 13 feet
  • Footprint: 10 by 10 feet

reviewText: I bought this back in March, put it up at the beginning of this month (June) and our winds in Vegas have been wicked this year.  First one of the joints gave way so I wired it and then the wind pushed the metal corner arm through the tent fabric.  Just buy a cheap pop up if you are in a windy city.  This was definitely not worth the money for the not even one month it lasted.

title: Coleman Dome Tent for Camping | Sundome Tent with Easy Setup
description: " The Coleman Sundome 4-Person Tent is designed for quick and easy setup, so you can spend more time enjoying the outdoors. Great for camping in warm weather, this backpacking tent is designed with large windows and a ground vent to help push warm air up and out to keep you comfortable. The WeatherTec system with patented welded floors and inverted seams helps ensure you stay dry if the weather turns, while the sturdy frame with Insta-Clip pole attachments stands up to 35+ mph winds. A rainfly with an integrated door awning is included to help keep rain from getting into the tent, and the durable Polyguard 2X double-thick fabric is designed to withstand the elements for reliable use season after season. This dome tent offers enough room for one queen size air mattress and comes with built-in storage pockets to help keep your gear organized. An E-Port makes it easy to bring electrical power inside the tent. The Coleman Sundome 4-Person Tent sets up in only 10 minutes thanks to snag-free continuous pole sleeves and packs away compactly in the included carry bag.
reviewText: These are okay entry-level tents, just don't expect "perfection" in a downpour and you'll do okay. Let's be honest.... most of us won't be climbing Everest soon. Best when bought on sale!!!

title: Coleman Sundome Dome Tent
reviewText: great

title: Coleman 8-Person Tent for Camping | Red Canyon Car Camping Tent
description: Measuring 17- by 10-feet, Coleman's Red Canyon tent is spacious enough to comfortably sleep eight campers. Ideal for weekend camping trips with family and friends, the Red Canyon features removable privacy walls, allowing you to create up to three separate rooms.
reviewText: For about $100 dollars great value. We are a family of four with two small children. We bought this tent to have enough space in the event of a rain day. I was disappointed after the first rain, of pooling along the inside edges of the tent. I was disappointed that directions need to be better. The tent does indeed pack back with all accessories into the carry bag included. I do not camp often, so I wanted a tent that I did not have to waterproof. Because of the claim by Coleman with their Weathertec water proofing, I was more confident in my purchase. I did see the rain bead and run off the tent fabric. But after awhile, the fabric below the rain fly and above the floor tub became saturated and wet to the touch inside. Also, on the very cool nights, this same section became wet to the touch inside the tent. The fabric under the rain fly never was wet and never had condensation in the morning. The ventilation is okay if there is a good breeze, otherwise the sun really heats up the  tent. Since the rain fly is velcroed to tents poles, guywired to ground stakes and attached to tent pole rings with bungee cord, removing the rain fly was not practical. It is really better to be outside the tent to remain cool than to rely on the mesh to keep the tent cool. This was our experience. We had battery operated fans which helped. I returned the tent after one week of use and two rainy nights primarily due to the water issues.

title: Coleman Plum Fun 45 Youth Sleeping Bag
description: Keep the kids comfortable as they sleep under the stars with the Coleman Youth Sleeping Bag, even when it's 45 F outside. ThermoTech insulation helps keep them comfortable all night long.
reviewText: nice product but found just about the same thing at store cheaper.

title: Coleman 8-Person Instant Tent Rainfly Accessory,Brown/Black
description:
Get better airflow in your Coleman Instant Tent with the Coleman Instant Tent Rainfly Accessory. Our tents are so well sealed and protected from the rain, campers sometimes lose some airflow when it starts to pour. This rainfly for the 14 x 8 ft. 8-Person Coleman Instant Tent not only gives you added protection from the weather, but it also allows you to crack your windows during a storm and still stay dry. reviewText: I have the 4 person Instant Tent.  It is great.  But, I wanted this one.  Did not work as I expected. Came in torn at some places. Uneven on the poles.

title: Coleman Steel-Belted Portable Cooler, 54 Quart
description: Go back in time with cold food and drinks today when you take a Coleman 54 Quart Steel Belted Cooler along with you. It looks just like the one you remember with its classic design first developed in 1954. Large enough to hold 85 cans and tall enough to hold 2-liter bottles upright, you'll have plenty of space for refreshments for a whole group of people. Whether you're headed on an overnight camping trip, to a tailgate party, or out to a BBQ, the comfort-grip steel handles and stainless steel lid latch make getting to your destination easy, comfortable and secure. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid will ensure you always have a place to sit and relax while you enjoy the day with a cold drink in hand. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain makes it easy to empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so you're ready for your next fun adventure. A Coleman Steel Belted Cooler will rekindle your fondest outdoor memories  and equip you to make many new ones.
reviewText:
Coleman has a long and rock solid reputation as the king of car camping.  But they've really let themselves slack.  I've owned this cooler for close to a decade now, and honestly it's not that good.  The lid doesn't stay shut.  The drain hole has a pathetic little plug and not a screw cap.  The handles are weak and bend easily.  And most importantly, it doesn't seem to keep things cold very well.

It's great for short simple things like running to the grocery store, but that's about it.  The Coleman Xtreme coolers do a better job of keeping things cold, but they aren't that great either.

title: Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler with Removable Liner
description: The Coleman 16-Can Soft Cooler goes with you to picnics, BBQs, camping, sporting events, tailgates and beyond. It holds 16 cans inside, and features plenty of extra storage space in its front zippered pocket, side mesh pockets, and mesh pocket in the lid. There are even bungees on the lid for stowing more extras! Sporting an adjustable shoulder strap, the cooler is soft on the outside for comfortable carrying, and has a hard plastic liner inside to protect your food from being crushed. The liner material is FDA approved for food contact, and is removable for easy cleaning. The Soft Cooler provides antimicrobial protection, to resist odors, mold, and mildew.
reviewText: I take this when I do volunteer work to carry cold drinks. Much more comfortable to carry than hard sides ones - I just sling it over my shoulder. I got the Bentgo lunch chillers ultra thin ice packs as well. One fits in a pouch inside the lid & I put 1 or 2 in with my drink bottles. Best feature: the hard shell plastic interior is easily removed for thorough cleaning.

title: Coleman Converta Cot
description: The Coleman Converta Cot provides comfortable seating at the campsite or in the backyard. Four back position and two foot positions for use as a lounge chair or cot.Unfolded Dimensions: 76 in. x 26 in. x 15.5 in..Folded Dimensions: 27.8 in. x 25 in. x 4.9 in..
reviewText:
These cots are horrible. I ordered one, used it for 4 nights and it broke (2 of the brackets got warped and the backing no longer would stand up on its own). Coleman sent me another one to replace it, and that new one broke after 2 nights of use.

These cots are horrible. Buyer beware.

title: Coleman 100-Quart Xtreme 5-Day Heavy-Duty Cooler with Wheels, Blue
description:
Food, drinksand the funlast longer, when you roll in with the Coleman 100-Quart Xtreme 5-Day Heavy-Duty Cooler with Wheels. To be exact, this cooler keeps ice up to 5 days at temps as high as 90F thanks to an insulated lid and extra insulation in the walls. Large enough to hold 160 cans, this spacious cooler transports and chills enough food and drinks so the entire party remains fueled and refreshed for the duration of your adventures. Wherever youre headedcampgrounds, tailgate parking lot, or across a ball fieldthe heavy-duty wheels and large tow handle let you roll over almost any terrain with little effort. The additional 2-way side handles make it easier to lift your cooler in and out of the car or onto a picnic bench. Once you arrive, the Have-A-Seat lid ensures you have a place to sit and relax, and the cup holders molded into the lid keep your drink close and prevent spills. When the fun is done, the leak-resistant channel drain lets you empty any excess water without tilting the cooler, so youre ready for your next fun adventure in no time. Carry up to 160 cans with ease--and store ice for up to five days even when it's 90 degrees outside--in the Xtreme 5 100-Quart Wheeled Cooler by Coleman. With two large wheels, two-way handles and a comfortable tow handle for one-hand operation, this cooler is easy to roll even on rough terrain. After the party, it's easy to drain thanks to a rustproof, leak-resistant channel drain for no-tilt draining. Features:
  • Keeps ice up to 5 days at 90 degrees Fahrenheit
  • Holds 160 cans
  • Hinged lid with beverage holders
  • Two-way handles for flexible easy carrying
  • Comfortable tow handle for one-hand operation
  • Rustproof, leak-resistant channel drain for no-tilt easy draining
  • Two large wheels for easy pulling, even on rough terrain
  • Made with Thermozone insulation that contains no toxic CFCs, HFCs, or HCFCs
Specifications:
  • Exterior Dimensions: 36.5 by 16.75 by 18.25 inches
  • Interior Dimensions: 23.75 by 11.75 by 13 inches
  • Weight Empty: 18 pounds
  • Made in the USA

reviewText:
Cooler was not used much and when I finally did use it to go fishing the wheels fall off..  Had coleman coolers in the past and they fared well throughout the years, NOT anymore!!!!!  See pics
Never buying a Coleman product again.!!!!  I'd give it no stars if I could.

title: Coleman Exponent Outfitter Camp Kitchen
description: The Coleman Exponent Outfitter Camp Kitchen is a complete, simple-to-set-up outdoor food preparation center. A spacious countertop, sink, pantry, and cooking stand are combined in this efficient unit to make preparing meals in the outdoors easy and enjoyable. No assembly is required -- the Outfitter Camp Kitchen simply unfolds and is ready to go to work. Its ideal for camping, backyard barbecues, picnics, beach parties, and tailgating. Measuring over six feet long (72.5") and over four feet high (50") when fully opened, the Camp Kitchen offers a spacious meal-prep area. It features a spacious polished-aluminum work surface for preparing foods, a side extender shelf for holding a camp stove, and a removable ABS plastic sink with drain plug and hose for doing dishes, rinsing vegetables or cleaning the days catch. There are built-in sections for just about everything else, including a paper-towel holder, chrome-plated wire hooks for cups and utensils, and shelving for spices or food storage. Weighing only 35 pounds, the Camp Kitchen folds down to a compact 42" x 21.75" x 7.5" and fits easily in most car trunks. It carries like a suitcase in its own rugged zippered nylon storage case, so its ready to go on a moments notice. The Outfitter Camp Kitchen can be used with legs extended to stand on its own, or with the legs folded underneath and placed on a tabletop or tailgate. Its durable enough to withstand heavy use, with strong, double-reinforced corners, positive stainless steel latches, a heavy-duty aluminum frame with stable leg braces for added support, and zinc-plated storage racks, dipped in PVC for extra rust-resistance. What's more, with the lid closed over the work surface between meals, the Camp Kitchen becomes a handy game table: enjoy playing backgammon, chess or checkers on the molded-in game boards; checker and backgammon pieces are even included! Simplify cooking for large groups on car and RV camping expeditions or tailgating parties with the Coleman Exponent 2142A700 Outfitter camp kitchen--a complete outdoor food preparation center. This two-tiered table system features a main preparation and storage area and a side extender shelf that easily holds most Coleman stoves. The storage/prep area includes a removable sink with drain plug and hose, paper towel holder, and chrome plated wire hooks and shelving for additional storage. It has a closeable lid with painted game boards (checkers/backgammon pieces included). It's made from heavy-duty channel extruded aluminum for added strength and features stable leg braces for added support, a convenient carry handle and rugged storage bag.
reviewText:
If you're thinking of buying this, DON'T. YOU DON'T NEED IT. My friend has one, and it's the most useless thing we've ever taken camping, and WAY more trouble than it's worth. If you have enough camping cups and dishes to fill the hooks and shelves, you have too many. Who wants to spend time washing all that stuff (including the unit itself) with freezing cold water in the woods?? Plus it's wobbly on uneven ground (ALL CAMP SITES) and there's really no reason to have a sink if you don't also have running water.

Anyway, isn't part of the fun of camping learning to simplify and improvise, instead of bringing your house and all the complicated maintenance that goes with it into the wilderness with you?

title: Coleman RoadTrip Swaptop Aluminum Grill Griddle, Full Size
description: Get more meals out of your Coleman RoadTrip Grill by adding a durable Coleman RoadTrip Swaptop Full Size Aluminum Griddle. Swaptop compatible, you can mix and match it with other cook tops (sold separately) for more meal options. It creates 285 sq. in. of cooking space for pancakes, bacon and more.
reviewText: Returned it you need a tow truck to take it on the road very heavy

title: Coleman 24-Hour 16-Can Cooler
description: Keep your food and drinks cold for an extended time when you bring a Coleman 24-Hour 16-Can Cooler to the park or the campsite. Extra insulation keeps your items cold for up to 24 hours. The zippered main compartment also helps seal in the cold, while a front pocket lets you store extra snacks. No matter where you go or what extras you bring, an adjustable shoulder strap makes it easy to carry. Once you're back home, the antimicrobial liner resists odor, mold, mildew and fungus on the product, making it easy to clean between each adventure.
reviewText: I had high hopes for this cooler, my expectations were not met. I used this for 2 days at work (12hr shifts indoors 75F). I tested this with 2 different sets of ice packs. I used mostly pre-chilled foods and drinks with just a couple things like pretzels being not pre-chilled and both lunches were very similar in amounts and items. The first day was with a Arctic Ice Alaskan Series Reusable Cooler Pack, 2.5-Pound, the second day was with 4 of the Set of 5 Cooler Shock lunch bag size ice packs - high performance 18 degree Fahrenheit using phase change science to achieve 8-10 hour cooling - avoid spoilage so you can eat your lunch!. The cooler failed to get down to fridge temps(below 40F), and failed to maintain temps with both sets of cooler packs. I took temperatures with a Elitech RC4 Temperature Data Logger Recorder with External Temperature Sensor every 5 min both days. I attached a pic of the graph. Over all I cannot recommend this cooler, it does not have enough insulation.

title: Clear Straight Lantern Globe (Similar to R690B048C)
description:
Clear, straight type globe. Used on lanterns model
No. 220 and 228 series, 290, 295, and 235. 4 7/8'' diameter x 5 1/4'' H.
reviewText: Great price and shipping thank you!

Carry up to 160 cans with ease--and store ice for up to five days even when it's 90 degrees outside--in the Xtreme 5 100-Quart Wheeled Cooler by Coleman. After the party, it's easy to drain thanks to a rustproof, leak-resistant channel drain for no-tilt draining. Features:
  • Keeps ice up to 5 days at 90 degrees Fahrenheit
  • Holds 160 cans
  • Hinged lid with beverage holders
  • Two-way handles for flexible easy carrying
  • Comfortable tow handle for one-hand operation
  • Rustproof, leak-resistant channel drain for no-tilt easy draining
  • Two large wheels for easy pulling, even on rough terrain
  • Made with Thermozone insulation that contains no toxic CFCs, HFCs, or HCFCs
Specifications:
  • Exterior Dimensions: 36.5 by 16.75 by 18.25 inches
  • Interior Dimensions: 23.75 by 11.75 by 13 inches
  • Weight Empty: 18 pounds
  • Made in the USA
About Coleman
More than 100 years ago, a young man with an entrepreneurial spirit and a better idea began manufacturing lanterns in Wichita, Kansas. His name was W.C. Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. A man plagued with such poor vision he sometimes had to ask classmates to read aloud to him, Coleman saw a brilliant light in 1900 in a drugstore window that stopped him in his tracks. He inquired about the light inside and discovered he was able to read even the small print on a medicine bottle by the illumination. The lamps had mantles, not wicks, and were fueled by gasoline under pressure instead of coal oil. Soon afterward, Coleman started a lighting service that offered a "no light, no pay" clause--a big step forward for merchants who were burned by inferior products that rarely worked--and drew substantial interest from businesses that wanted to keep their lights on after dark. In the ensuing years, Coleman expanded its product line well beyond lanterns. The company's current catalog is thick with products that make spending time outdoors a pleasure. There are coolers that keep food and drinks cold for days on end, comfortable airbeds that won't deflate during the night, a complete line of LED lights that last for years, powerful portable grills that cook with an authentic open-grill flame, and much, much more. Coleman has truly fashioned much of our outdoor camping experience, and expects to do so for generations to come.
reviewText: I like that I like it so much I purchased two more they're awesome

title: Coleman LED Rechargeable Lantern
description:
The famous, instantly-recognizable Coleman lantern, with the long life and quality of LED lighting and the convenience of rechargeable power. The Coleman LED Rechargeable Lantern features a super-bright, long-lasting Cree Xlamp XR-E LED, shedding 145 lumens of light on the High setting. A single charge will power the Lantern for 10 hours on Low and 5 hours on High. The included 12V and 120V adapters can both be stored in the base of the lantern, for compact storage. The Lantern features three lighting modes: High, Low, and Nightlight. The durable housing is weather-resistant, with a chrome-plated rhino guard, so it will stand up to outdoor use. Color: Black. Boasting a rechargeable battery that runs for 10 consecutive hours on low and five hours on high, the Coleman rechargeable LED lantern is a great choice for short camping trips or emergency supply kits. The lantern is equipped with a Cree XLamp XR-E LED bulb that provides 145 lumens of intensity, so you can keep your surroundings well lit in any situation. At the same time, the long-lasting bulb keeps the lantern cool to the touch, making it family-safe. The lantern also includes an "emergency on" setting, which lights the lantern automatically during a power failure. To activate the "emergency on" setting, simply set the lantern to the high or low position while charging the battery. Other features include a durable chrome-plated rhino guard; a weather-resistant housing; and two power adapters: a 120-volt AC adapter for home charging and a 12-volt power adapter for vehicle charging. Both chargers are stored in the base. The Coleman LED rechargeable lantern carries a five-year warranty. About Coleman

Coleman, and the company he founded would change life in America. reviewText:
At 145 Lumens, this is not a particulalry bright lamp, especially given it's size. A very short 10 hour life (on high) is also poor.  Other less expensive Coleman battery lanterns offer comparable brightness and 40 hour life expectancy.  Coleman chiseled on the NiCd pack in tis thing and it shows.  Even more surprising is the claim in the owners manual that the light may not illuminate at temperatures below 20 degF?  What's with this limit?

So, if you want to buy Coleman, I'd suggest the 4D collapsible LED Lantern at $25.  If you want good performance, I like the smaller Brunton Polaris.

title: Coleman Propane Grill | RoadTrip LXE Portable Gas Grill
description: Stop manhandling those heavy, bulky backyard beasts and show off as the grill master with the Coleman RoadTrip LXE Propane Grill. It's easy to tote around and set up. Just fold it up, roll it with one hand to your favorite cooking spot and set it up in a matter of seconds with the lift and lock system. The grill comes equipped with durable cast-iron grilling surfaces. (Coleman RoadTrip pot support and griddles are available separately.) When you're ready to grill, push a button to ignite the InstaStart matchless lighting system. Cook for more than an hour on one propane cylinder with 20,000 BTUs of power on 285 sq. in. (1838.7 sq. cm) of cooking surface. It's perfect for BBQs, picnics, tailgating, camping or a night on the patio. When you're ready to leave, it folds down small enough to fit in the back of most car trunks.
reviewText: Gave to my sister. Got smashed in Shipping. Never used it. Seemed like a nice unit

title: Coleman Big Game Big and Tall Adult Sleeping Bag
description:
Sleep comfortably--even when the temperature dips below freezing--with the Coleman Big Game Big and Tall Adult Sleeping Bag. Long enough for people up to 6 feet 5 inches in height, this adult sleeping bag is designed to keep you warm in temperatures as low as 0 degrees Fahrenheit. The cotton canvas cover and cozy cotton flannel liner retain heat, so you feel warm from head to toe. For additional comfort, a Thermolock draft tube helps prevent heat from escaping through the zipper, and a ComfortCuff surrounds your face in soft, warm fabric. Fiberlock construction keeps the insulation from shifting, reducing cold spots and increasing durability. A two-way patented ZipPlow zipper system plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. And the Roll Control design and Wrap 'N Roll integrated packing system make this backpacking sleeping bag easy to roll and pack. The Big Game Sleeping Bag is machine washable and comes with a matching flannel pillow. Stay snugly warm as you slumber on camping and hunting excursions with the Coleman Big Game sleeping bag, which is rated to temperatures as low as -5 degrees Fahrenheit. It's filled with five pounds of Holofill 808 insulation, which offers high-loft, hollow-core fibers that prevent body heat from escaping, thus holding more air inside the bag for good warmth. This super king-sized, rectangular sleeping bag measures 40 by 85 inches, and will fit most sleepers up to 6 foot, 5 inches. Other features include a heavy duty cotton cover material, cotton flannel liner, an included pillow, and Coleman's exclusive set of ComfortSmart sleeping bag technologies, including:
  • ZipPlow: Prevents zipper snags by plowing fabric away from zipper
  • FiberLock: Prevents insulation from shifting, increasing durability
  • ThermoLock: Reduces heat loss through the zipper, keeping you warmer
  • Zipper GlideTailoring: Allows smooth zipper operation around the corner
  • Comfort Cuff: Surrounds your face with softness
  • Roll Control: Locks bag in place for easier rolling
About Coleman
The Coleman Company has been creating and innovating products for recreational outdoor use since W.C. Coleman started selling gasoline-powered lanterns in 1900. Inventor of the hugely popular fold-up camp stove, Coleman developed a plastic liner for his galvanized steel coolers in 1957--the birth of the modern cooler--and the company has been improving their utility and design ever since. The array of products that bear the Coleman name now includes just about everything you might need to work or play outdoors, from tents and sleeping bags to boats, backpacks, and furniture.
reviewText: I would say I love this except for the color and the weight of the outer fabric. It looks like something I've "borrowed" from the military - there is no reason camping can't be colorful and fun. We had nights where the temperature fell to 24 deg F with pouring rain. Even though the sleeping bag got wet due to a leaky tent I remained warm and toasty all night.

Not used yet. I was slightly disappointed with the size felt the description left me thinking it was bigger.
However I am going to find use for these pans during my next camping trip. Really did not utilize it as it was so small. Would be great for hiking

title: Coleman Stratus Adult Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner
description:
The Coleman Stratus Adult Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner doubles as both a warm, cozy liner and a low-profile sleeping bag. On its own, the liner can keep you warm in temperatures as low as 50 degrees Fahrenheit. When placed inside another sleeping bag, it can provide 12 degrees Fahrenheit of extra thermal protection. This low-profile sleeping bag liner features a two-way patented ZipPlow zipper system that plows fabric away from the zipper to prevent snags and frustration. It also features an elastic storage strap and stuff sack for easy packing and transport. The Stratus Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner can accommodate most people up to 5 feet 11 inches in height. It is machine washable for easy cleaning. The Coleman 8197C410 Stratus Fleece Sleeping Bag Liner is the perfect accompaniment to any sleeping bag, especially when you are camping where you are not sure how cold it is going to be. This sleeping-bag liner is full-size, measuring 33-inches by 75-inches, and fits most full-size sleeping bags up to 5-feet 11-inches long. When used with a sleeping bag, this liner adds 12 degrees of thermal protection, making a 35-degree sleeping bag usable at temperatures as low as 23 degrees! The Coleman fleece sleeping-bag liner is commercial-machine-washable only and comes with its own stuff sack. Manufacturer Warranty
Five-year warranty
reviewText: Not a sleeping bag

title: Coleman Cooler Stainless Steel Hinges and Screws
description: For replacement on most Coleman Coolers with plastic hinges as well as Coleman steel Coolers made after 2000.
reviewText: The hinges on my Coleman cooler did not fail at the flex point, but the screws pulled out of the plastic. I could have reused the hinges and simply moved them over an inch or two, but I decided to replace with the stainless steel ones instead. The problem that I see is that the screws are simply screwing into very thin plastic. It is extraordinarily easy to over tighten the screw and simply strip  it out of the plastic. The screws that pass through the body of the cooler could easily be replaced with through bolts and nuts, however you cannot do this for the ones that screw into the lid so just be very careful when screwing in that you do not over tighten and strip out the plastic. You do not need to drill holes, you can simply just press firmly with your screwdriver and the screws will bite right into the plastic. Once you get them started this way, then be very careful to apply only minimal torque and do not over tighten.

title: Coleman Instant Cabin
reviewText:
Great tent well worth it it does not need a rain fly we got caught in a heavy storm and it did not leak at all.  Plenty of room  although I would say it is more like comfy for three people instead of eight. you can pack eight people in but there is only room to walk in and out.  now if you have a pack of cub scouts eight would be no problem.  The tent gets five stars the packaging only three. Amazon has failed again on quality control when shipping items.  This is the reason I gave it three stars.

Setting up was a breeze I do recommend getting heavy duty metal stakes if you are camping in any wind or in the open.  (see image)  These are the style I got for my tent.

title: Coleman Folding Shovel with Pick
description: Coleman 2000016390 shovel folding w/pick. Camping knives & tools shovels. Made of the highest quality materials. Camping knives & tools shovels
reviewText: It just arrived and while other reviewers complain it's too small, I have to ask, too small for what? You're not going to dig a drainage ditch with this shovel, that's true, but it's the right size for a backpacking shovel, which is its main purpose.  It folds up nicely and is very compact in the carrying case. Slightly weighty due to the steel, but I expect it will be rather durable as well.  It does claim it can be used as a saw, but I don't think the teeth are sharp enough for that.

title: Coleman Camp Axe
description: Get the right tool for multiple jobs when you're at the campsite with the Coleman Camp Axe. The sharp edge of the durable drop-forged steel head easily splits wood for a campfire or stove, while the flat edge works wonders for driving tent stakes into hard ground. When it's time to pack up, pulling your tent stakes is easy with the notch cut into the head. Durable and well built, the Coleman Camp Axe is perfect for the campsite, wooded terrain, or the backyard. The axe is equipped with a drop-forged carbon-steel axe head that easily splits wood into kindling, along with a forged steel handle and an ergonomic nonslip grip. With the Coleman Camp Axe, you'll be ready for any camping contingency.
reviewText: Careful when using it.  The handle is short and takes some getting used to.  It's a hatchet, not an axe!!!

title: Coleman 2 Gallon Party Stacker Beverage Cooler
description: Keep quenched in fun, space-saving style with a Coleman 2 Gallon Party Stacker Jug. The unique stacking design offers vertical storage and use, while its two-gallon capacity is perfect for school parties and family functions. You can even use different colored jugs for different drinks so serving and filling is fast and fun. The removable spigot is easy to clean, and the large bail handle makes carrying easy.
reviewText: It's not bad for what I need it for (watering dogs on the go), but the spigot leaks a bit when it's just sitting there. Not sure if I can return it now that I've actually used it and found out. Very glad I only had water in there.

title: Coleman Camper’s Toilet Paper, 3 Rolls
description: Take an everyday hygiene necessity on camping trips with Coleman Campers Toilet Paper. Includes 3 rolls of biodegradable, septic-safe 2-ply toilet paper that easily fits in any camping backpack. Each roll contains at least 65 squares of premium tissue and comes in a case that also doubles as a dispenser for added convenience. Compact and convenient, Coleman Campers Toilet Paper lets you take an essential indoor comfort wherever the trail leads.
reviewText:
Toilet paper in the woods is for sissys.

Here's what you do... squat and do your biz... wait for a squirrel to come by.  Grab said squirrel and use as anal brush. Sometimes after too many smore's the night before I have to two-squirrel it.  No biggie.

 It's quick, clean and leaves no trace (except of course on the squirrel - but it will rain soon).  I mean who needs toilet paper anyways when you have tree rats?

Right?

Orrrr... just steal a roll of that Charmin stuff from your mom's house and bend it so the core closes, place in zip lock bag (also from mom's house) and stick in pack.  Or napkins from McDonalds.  That all works too.

Or you could go blow $7.33 on this little gem of an idea.

title: Coleman 0°F Mummy Sleeping Bag for Big and Tall Adults | North Rim Cold-Weather Sleeping Bag

title: Coleman 2000016402 Mess Kit, Aluminum, 5-Pc.
description: 5 Piece, Aluminum Mess Kit, Includes 8 OZ Cup, 7" Fry Pan, 16 OZ Pot With Lid & 6.5" Dish Pan, Pieces Nest Inside Each Other & Is Covered With A Lid For Easy Storage & Transport.
reviewText: thses seems a bit flimsy but cant wait to test them pit on our next camping

title: Coleman Camping Instant Signal Mountain Tent
reviewText: Horrible Tent.  I'm just glad I only had to pay $60 for this piece of junk.  This tent lasted 7 days from light use during RAGBRAI 2017.  The overall design of the tent is awful.  The setup is pretty easy, but trying to repack the tent and figure out how to fold it back together is a nightmare.  There are a few pictures to show the setup, but nothing on how to repack the tent.  Not even on youtube.  If you make one wrong fold you'll break a tent pole rolling the tent back up.  The poles on my tent got several stress fractures resulting in one breaking in half (not from setup or repacking). Once the tent is setup it is nice and sturdy and plenty of room for a cot or two.  Just the overall design of the tent leaves a little to be desired.  Just to much going on.  The other bad part of this tent is the damn zippers.  I understand that zippers will get caught in the fabric every now an then, but this thing is constantly getting the zipper caught in the green flap around the door. A serious pain in the a$$. I filed a warranty with Coleman, so we'll see how good their customer service is for this fiasco. Knocking of two stars for the defective tent poles and one star for the zippers

title: Coleman Jug With Water Carrier, 5 Gallons, Blue
description: Coleman, 5 gallon, blue, poly Lite water carrier, molded in handle & hand grip, fast flow spigot stores on the handle when not in use, non-insulated, polyethylene case resists scratches & dents. Comfortably port water to your campsite, picnic, boat, and beyond with the Coleman 5-gallon water carrier. The carrier features a tough polyethylene construction that's scratch- and impact-resistant, helping it hold up to rough handling. More importantly, the carrier's fast-flow spigot delivers instant water access; no more struggling to tip the carrier each time you fill up your water bottle. The carrier also includes a built-in molded handle and handgrip for comfortable, easy carrying.
reviewText: Happy with my order, heavy duty. Im all ready for my camping trip. I oredered 2 of those.

reviewText:
Great air mattress, kept my big arse comfy camping 2 nights without losing any air.

Actually was very comfortable for my wife and I.

title: Coleman Camper's Utensil Set
description: The perfect compact tool for any mess kit is the Coleman Camper's Utensil Set. reviewText: Replacing this with the exact one I had that I lost last year.  For the most part no problems with it except sometimes stick food or sauces gets stuck in storage area (red) & it's hard to wipe off while away from a running water.

title: Coleman Instant Dome 5 Person Tent with Integrated Rainfly
description: The Coleman 5-Person Instant Cabin tent makes camping easy so you can enjoy every moment of your outdoor adventure. In about a minute you can have the tent set up or taken down. The spacious tent fits two queen-sized airbeds. The exclusive WeatherTec system, and a well integrated rainfly keep you safer from the weather. You'll love the Illumiline reflective guy lines, as well as the pre-attached poles of this instant cabin. Nothing kills a campsite buzz like a tent with too many poles and too little instruction. Enter the Coleman Instant Dome Tent , a five-person tent that sets up in less than a minute. The tent is made using an innovative one-piece design, with poles that come pre-attached to the tent. That means there's no frustrating assembly and no parts to lose. Simply unfold the tent, spread out the fabric, extend the poles, and click and lock. The only thing easier is rolling out your bag and sleeping in the open. The tent is outfitted with Coleman's exclusive WeatherTec system, a series of technical features intended to protect you from inclement weather and nasty storms. WeatherTec tents are built with a coated polyester fabric combined with anti-wicking thread, webbing, and zippers, all designed to keep you dry when the rain comes down.
reviewText:
I really wanted to love this tent.  It was just what I was looking for, and much lighter in weight than the instant tents from before.  I read all the reviews that I could find, and though they were mixed, I decided that for the price, I didn't expect it to last forever so I jumped in.  Based on pricing, I opted to buy online at Costco.

One of the bridge poles was broken and there were no tent stakes,  and it was most definitely a new tent that I purchased.

I am so glad that I attempted to set up the tent prior to taking it out camping.  It could have been a bad start to a good time.  I am returning it.

Since I didn't get to use it, I can't report to how easy it was to put up, or it's features.

The instructions provided are minimal so if you decide to go for it, watch the video on YouTube.

title: Coleman 2000014864 Mosquito Head Net
description: Enjoy the outdoors without the pests when you're wearing a Coleman Mosquito Head Net. The fine mesh stops insects from biting, while still allowing you to see nature's beauty. Keep flying insects out when hiking or working in mosquito- or gnat-ridden territory with the Coleman insect head net.
